mapper.sql: SELECT f.*, g.title AS goods_title, g.images AS goods_images, g.price AS goods_price FROM user_favorite f JOIN goods g ON f.goods_id = g.goods_id JOIN sys_user u ON g.user_id = u.user_id
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND goods_id = #{goodsId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND goods_id = #{goodsId}
WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND g.status = 1 ORDER BY f.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_favorite WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId}
